caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold and white sits at a desk in a studio. He has a watch on his left wrist and his hands are clasped in front of him. Positioned directly before him is a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background features a white wall with a recurring logo consisting of five stars and the text "URBAN MUSTLE." A sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, a black mug is visible, bearing the text "THE TALK OUT". On the far left of the desk is a black device with a red and white logo that says "THE TALK OUT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, slightly shifting his head and facial expression while looking toward someone off-camera.
